Bolt.focus_area: Performance optimizations in CI shell scripts
guidance: Review the CI shell scripts and ensure native bash operations are utilized.

Replace subprocess-heavy string slicing, repeated `id -nu` calls, or `awk` usage where native parameter expansion, process substitution with `loginctl`, or native bash integer arithmetic are more performant.

Palette.focus_area: UX enhancements in CI error messages
guidance: Review terminal error messages in the updated test scripts.
Ensure all error messages are formatted as multi-line outputs incorporating a clear '💡 How to fix:' block with bulleted actionable remediation steps to minimize developer cognitive load.

Sentinel.focus_area: Security review of CI workflow changes
guidance: Review the CI workflow changes, specifically focusing on the privileged execution (`--privileged`) of the `test` job.
Ensure that this execution mode does not introduce unintended security risks outside the intended scope of pre-build validation.
